mapper.select: SELECT MAX(c.cmt_no) AS cmtNo, MAX(c.cmt_starng) AS cmtStarng, t.trip_conts_id AS tripContsId, t.trip_nm AS tripNm, t.trip_addr AS tripAddr, COALESCE(t.trip_path_nm, af.file_path_nm) AS tripPathNm FROM cmt c JOIN trip t ON c.trip_course_no = t.trip_conts_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ( /* 첨부파일 1개 가져오는 기존 서브쿼리 */ SELECT board_id, file_path_nm FROM ( SELECT board_id, file_path_nm, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY board_id ORDER BY ROWID ASC) as rn FROM attach_file WHERE board_clsf = 'trip' ) WHERE rn = 1 ) af ON t.trip_conts_id = af.board_id WHERE c.reg_no = #{regNo} AND c.cmt_clsf = '1' AND (t.trip_path_nm IS NOT NULL OR af.file_path_nm IS NOT NULL) /* 핵심: 이름뿐만 아니라 ID와 주소, 이미지 경로까지 묶어줘야 에러가 안 납니다 */ GROUP BY t.trip_conts_id, t.trip_nm, t.trip_addr, COALESCE(t.trip_path_nm, af.file_path_nm)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cmt c JOIN trip t ON c.trip_course_no = t.trip_conts_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT board_id, file_path_nm FROM ( SELECT board_id, file_path_nm, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY board_id ORDER BY ROWID ASC) as rn FROM attach_file WHERE board_clsf = 'trip' ) WHERE rn = 1 ) af ON t.trip_conts_id = af.board_id WHERE c.reg_no = #{regNo} AND c.cmt_clsf = '1' AND (t.trip_path_nm IS NOT NULL OR af.file_path_nm IS NOT NULL)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ss_user ( USER_NO, USER_NICK, USER_EML_ADDR, USER_ENPSWD, USER_NM, USER_BRDT, USER_TELNO, USER_GNDR, USER_MNGR_YN, USER_REG, USER_REG_HM, USER_DEL_YN, USER_DRM_YN, USER_TAG, USER_ZIP, USER_ADDR, USER_DADDR ) VALUES ( USER_NO_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{userNick}, #{userEmlAddr}, #{userEnpswd}, #{userNm}, #{userBrdt}, #{userTelno}, #{userGndr}, 'N', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), 'N', 'N', #{userTag}, #{userZip}, #{userAddr}, #{userDaddr} )
mapper.select: SELECT USER_NO, USER_NICK, USER_EML_ADDR, USER_NM, USER_ENPSWD, USER_TELNO, USER_TAG, USER_ZIP, USER_ADDR, USER_DADDR FROM ss_user WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE ss_user SET USER_NICK = #{userNick} WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
UPDATE ss_user SET USER_TAG = #{userTag} WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
UPDATE ss_user SET USER_ENPSWD = #{userEnpswd} WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
mapper.select: SELECT r.TRIP_CONTS_ID, t.TRIP_NM, t.TRIP_ADDR, /* 기본 이미지가 없으면 첨부파일 테이블의 첫 번째 이미지를 사용 */ COALESCE(t.TRIP_PATH_NM, af.file_path_nm) AS tripPathNm FROM relation r JOIN trip t ON r.TRIP_CONTS_ID = t.TRIP_CONTS_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( /* 각 여행지(board_id)별로 대표 이미지 1장만 추출 */ SELECT board_id, file_path_nm FROM ( SELECT board_id, file_path_nm, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY board_id ORDER BY ROWID ASC) as rn FROM attach_file WHERE board_clsf = 'trip' ) WHERE rn = 1 ) af ON r.TRIP_CONTS_ID = af.board_id WHERE r.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND r.REL_CLSF = #{relClsf}
